description:
You are a digital archivist for a live music venue. Process the 2-minute concert recording at /home/ga/Videos/venue_showcase_2024.mp4 into individual deliverables for 5 performances based on the setlist provided.

For each track, generate the following in /home/ga/Music/album_output/:
- An MP3 audio file in the 'tracks/' subdirectory (track_01.mp3 to track_05.mp3) with embedded ID3 metadata for Title, Artist, Album ('Venue Showcase 2024'), and Track number.
- A PNG thumbnail in the 'thumbnails/' subdirectory (thumb_01.png to thumb_05.png) captured from the performance duration.
- An
